channel.title: Data-Engineering on OpenSwap Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Data-Engineering on OpenSwap Guide

item.title: Apache Airflow vs Prefect vs Dagster: Best Self-Hosted Data Orchestration 2026
item.description: The modern data stack runs on pipelines — ETL jobs, data transformations, ML model training schedules, and batch processing workflows. At the center of it all sits the orchestrator: the system that decides what runs, when, and in what order.
